source: Microsoft acquisition 2018 $7.5B; revenue ~$1B at acquisition; serves $5T+ global software economy
notes: The canonical 'platform infra captures 0.02% of ecosystem' anchor. Acquired pre-IPO so the multiple reflects strategic premium.

source: $4.5B Series D 2023 (Aug); $200M ARR estimated 2024; AI ecosystem ~$200B addressable
notes: ML platform that became the canonical hub. 0.1% capture rate of ecosystem value; high multiple due to platform position.

source: NYSE:NET; 2024 revenue ~$1.5B; market cap ~$30B; serves the global web traffic value chain
notes: Mid-tier infra platform; 0.15% capture rate. Useful as a 'mature public infra' comp.

source: NASDAQ:DDOG; 2024 revenue ~$2.5B; market cap ~$40B; serves cloud infra spend
notes: Observability is the cleanest analog to Lupine's audit substrate role. 0.25% capture rate of cloud spend it observes.

source: NASDAQ:SNOW; 2024 revenue ~$3.5B; market cap ~$70B; cloud data warehouse market
notes: Data platform comp; high capture rate because directly transactional, not observability.

source: NASDAQ:MDB; ~$2B revenue; ~$30B market cap; database market
notes: Database platform comp; transactional rather than substrate.

source: NYSE:SHOP; ~$7B revenue; ~$150B market cap; processes ~$300B GMV across $3T+ commerce
notes: Platform-as-rails comp; takes a small % of huge GMV.

source: Synopsys acquisition Jan 2024 $35B close 2025; ~$2.2B revenue; engineering simulation served
notes: Most-direct comp for engineering-simulation platform exit. Used as the math floor anchor; here it is the lower-bound platform comp.

source: NASDAQ:SNPS; ~$7B revenue; ~$90B market cap; serves $500B+ semi industry design
notes: EDA is the only mature 'audit + simulation substrate' that has fully consolidated. ~1.4% capture of semi design productivity.
Cadence + Synopsys split the EDA platform; combined ~2.3% capture of semi design productivity.

source: Linux Foundation 2023 annual report ~$200M revenue; underlying ecosystem ~$10T+ enabled
notes: Open-source platform comp where revenue is governance/conferences but ecosystem value is enormous. Floor capture rate.

source: Median EV/Rev across GitHub/HuggingFace/Cloudflare/Datadog/Snowflake/MongoDB/Shopify/Cadence; median capture rate
notes: Median EV/Rev across modern platform infra: ~17.5x. Median capture rate (excluding LinuxFoundation outlier and Synopsys ceiling): ~0.22%.
Mature simulation/audit platform median: ~14.4x EV/Rev, ~1.15% capture rate. The 'what audit substrate looks like fully consolidated' anchor.
